Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…
• Blogs
• Your blog
• Relationships with other bloggers
• Consistently leave intelligent comments on
other people’s blogs
• Be cool and help their positioning
• Guest posts?
Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…
• Forum presence
• It’s easy to find high value forums – do a Google
search
• Follow the group norms
• Read and observe for a few days
• #1 thing is to add value – don’t promote until
you add value
• Testimonials or Case Studies (for you, your
product or your service)
Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…	Other assets…
• Joint Venture or Affiliate Relationships
• Best way to get on people’s radar is to sell their
stuff – be an affiliate for them
• Find a way to add value to them
• Build a relationship first
• Who are your dream partners and how can you
start adding value to them now?
